name: Luminous Guardian
description:
Admittedly, I’m playing a dangerous game here. I know very little about Palworld and have not played it as of writing this bot. But look at Quivern. LOOK AT IT! IT’S ADORABLE! And thus, one look at Quivern gave me all the inspiration I need to make the bot you’re about to delve into.

Allow me to get this out of the way. I am a very big fan of transformation scenarios, but more than that, I am a very big enthusiast about post-tf scenarios. The stories that come after the transformation has already ended. Getting used to your new body, life, abilities, all that. Especially if it involves weight gain, which... Quivern certainly has some visible softness to it.

There, I said it. I hope there’s no judgement towards me...

Anyways, rambling aside, details of the RPG are listed below in the definitions.
creator: SacredSean
